title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (ai), GROUP I, SUBPARAGRAPH 43, FOR THE PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, PAGE 371, PARAGRAPH (f), SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2831 / 57 OG No. 6, 1006 (February 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2768, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (ai), GROUP I, SUBPARAGRAPH 43, FOR THE PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, PAGE 371, PARAGRAPH (f), SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

ai

), Group I, subparagraph 43, for the Province of Pangasinan, page 371, paragraph (

f

), Section two of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(ai) Quinaoayanan-Tipor barrio road, Bani

Construction P10,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
